tasks.subject: T1: Verify setup-pixi v0.9.x changelog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pre-flight gate before touching the workflow. Confirm no breaking change in setup-pixi v0.8.1 → v0.9.6 invalidates the current `with: { pixi-version: latest, cache: true }` block.

**Files:**
- Read-only (web): https://github.com/prefix-dev/setup-pixi/releases (tags v0.9.0 through v0.9.6)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Release notes for v0.9.0 through v0.9.6 reviewed.
- [ ] `cache: true` semantics confirmed unchanged.
- [ ] `pixi-version: latest` still supported.
- [ ] Findings recorded as a single line ready to paste into T3's commit body. If a breaking change is found, STOP and amend the spec §3.3 with a workaround before proceeding.

**Verify:** Manual. Output is the implementer's plain-text findings appended to T3's commit body.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh release list --repo prefix-dev/setup-pixi --limit 10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["v0.9.0..v0.9.6 release notes reviewed", "cache: true semantics unchanged", "pixi-version: latest still supported", "findings recorded for T3 commit body"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: Add module-level xfail marker to RED scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert 4 known-RED lockdown tests in `tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py` from `failed` to `xfailed` so the full suite exits 0. Preserves regression-lockdown intent (xfail still executes the body). Marker removal handled later as part of Layer P Task 7 item #3 closure.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `import pytest` added in the correct ruff import-group (third-party, after stdlib `pathlib`, before first-party `kinoforge.*`).
- [ ] Module-level `pytestmark = pytest.mark.xfail(strict=False, reason=…)` declared once, after the `YAML_PATH = …` constant, before the first `def test_…`.
- [ ] `reason=` cites Layer P Task 7 item #3 + PROGRESS reference + spec path `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-layer-p-task7-item3-workflow-api-json-design.md`.
- [ ] File-level `pixi run test -q tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py` reports `4 xfailed`. Exit 0.
- [ ] Full suite `pixi run test -q` reports `979 passed, 4 xfailed, 3 skipped`. Exit 0.
- [ ] `pixi run lint`, `pixi run typecheck`, `pixi run pre-commit run --files <file>` clean.
- [ ] Single commit landed on `chore/ci-green-recovery` branch.

**Verify:**

```bash
pixi run test -q tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py 2>&1 | tail -3
pixi run test -q 2>&1 | tail -3
```

**Steps:** See plan T2 in `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-01-ci-green-recovery.md` for full marker code, ruff rationale, and commit message template.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py 2>&1 | tail -3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import pytest added in correct ruff group", "module-level pytestmark = pytest.mark.xfail(strict=False, reason=...) declared", "reason cites item #3 + PROGRESS + spec path", "file-level pytest reports 4 xfailed exit 0", "full suite reports 979 passed 4 xfailed 3 skipped exit 0", "lint typecheck pre-commit clean", "single commit landed"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: Bump CI action pins to Node-24 line
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Silence the Node 20 deprecation warning by moving `actions/checkout` and `prefix-dev/setup-pixi` onto Node-24-era versions, before the 2026-06-16 forced-Node-24 default cutoff.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `uses: actions/checkout@v4` → `uses: actions/checkout@v6`.
- [ ] `uses: prefix-dev/setup-pixi@v0.8.1` → `uses: prefix-dev/setup-pixi@v0.9.6`.
- [ ] No other CI step changed.
- [ ] T1's changelog findings included in the commit body.
- [ ] `pixi run pre-commit run --files .github/workflows/ci.yml` clean.
- [ ] Single commit landed on `chore/ci-green-recovery` branch.

**Verify:**

```bash
grep -nE 'uses: (actions/checkout|prefix-dev/setup-pixi)' .github/workflows/ci.yml
pixi run pre-commit run --files .github/workflows/ci.yml 2>&1 | tail -5
```

**Steps:** See plan T3 in `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-01-ci-green-recovery.md` — exact Edit old/new strings + commit message template.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE 'uses: (actions/checkout|prefix-dev/setup-pixi)' .github/workflows/ci.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["checkout@v4 bumped to @v6", "setup-pixi@v0.8.1 bumped to @v0.9.6", "no other CI step changed", "T1 changelog findings in commit body", "pre-commit clean on file", "single commit landed"]}
```

tasks.subject: T4: Push feature branch + observe green CI + merge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final integration. Push the two-commit feature branch, watch both `Test (ubuntu-latest)` + `Test (macos-latest)` jobs go green, confirm Node 20 warning is gone, then merge `chore/ci-green-recovery` into `main` with `--no-ff` and confirm CI on `main` is green.

**Files:**
- No edits. Branch + push + observation + merge only.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Feature branch `chore/ci-green-recovery` exists with exactly the T2 + T3 commits (`git log --oneline main..HEAD`).
- [ ] Branch pushed via `git push -u origin chore/ci-green-recovery`.
- [ ] Feature-branch CI: both `Test (ubuntu-latest)` AND `Test (macos-latest)` jobs report `conclusion: success`.
- [ ] No `Node.js 20 actions are deprecated` string in the workflow log.
- [ ] Merge into `main` via `gh pr merge --merge --no-ff --delete-branch` (or local `git merge --no-ff`).
- [ ] CI on `main` for the merge commit is GREEN.
- [ ] Optional: short closure block appended to `PROGRESS.md` recording the merge SHA + final suite count.

**Verify:**

```bash
gh run list --branch chore/ci-green-recovery --limit 1
gh run view --log <run-id> | grep -i "Node.js 20" || echo "PASS: no Node 20 warning"
gh run view <run-id> --json conclusion -q .conclusion   # expect: success
# After merge:
gh run list --branch main --limit 1
```

**Steps:** See plan T4 in `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-01-ci-green-recovery.md` for full `gh pr create` / `git merge --no-ff` commands + PR body template + PROGRESS.md closure-block guidance.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --branch chore/ci-green-recovery --limit 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["feature branch contains T2 + T3 commits", "branch pushed", "both ubuntu and macos jobs report success", "no Node 20 warning in log", "merged into main via --no-ff", "CI on main for merge commit is green"]}
```
